raw_consumer_statement:
Using my Citibank Double Cash credit card, I purchases some fresh mushrooms from the website XXXX on XX/XX/year> in the amount of {$42.00}. The mushrooms were rotten and inedible. After disputing the charge, XXXX issued a credit, then charged me {$42.00} again. 

I disputed this second charge with Citibank but they denied the claim. I have been a Citibank customer for over 10 years and spent a lot of time trying to reach Citibank about this claim. To add insult to injury, Citibank is charging my credit card 1 ) interest and 2 ) a late fee because of this. 

I have tried phone calls and online chat with Citibank customer service without success.
